title: El águila negra en el tesoro de la muerte
writer: Mario García Camberos, Ramón Peón, Alfonso Rosas Priego
actors: Fernando Casanova, Gloria Lozano, Eulalio González
plot: A Masked-Avenger, known as The Black Eagle is part of an intended serial character, who rides his trusty horse and helps the downtrodden townsfolk of the Old West.
